tools.name: plan_journey
tools.description: Plan public-transit journeys in Japan between two points. `from`/`to` are a station id (`feedId:stopId`, from suggest_places/suggest_stations) or `geo:<lat>,<lon>`. `type` selects 出発(departure)/到着(arrival)/始発(first)/終電(last); optional `via` waypoints and mode allow/avoid. Times in the result are seconds from the timezone's service-date midnight (may exceed 86400 or be negative).

from.description: Origin: a station id (feedId:stopId) or geo:<lat>,<lon>.

to.description: Destination: a station id (feedId:stopId) or geo:<lat>,<lon>.

fromLabel.description: Optional display name for the origin.

toLabel.description: Optional display name for the destination.

viaLabel.description: Optional display label for each via, positionally matched to via[].

date.description: Service date YYYYMMDD; defaults to today in the result timezone.

time.description: HH:MM or HH:MM:SS; defaults to the current time.

type.description: 出発 / 到着 / 始発 / 終電.

allowModes.description: Comma-separated transit modes to allow (pre-scan filter), e.g. rail,bus.

avoidModes.description: Comma-separated transit modes to avoid (pre-scan filter), e.g. bus,air,ferry.

avoidWalk.description: When true, exclude any itinerary containing a walking segment.

via.description: Up to 3 経由 waypoints, repeated: a station id or geo:<lat>,<lon>. Departure/arrival searches only.

tools.name: plan_route_map
tools.description: Plan a journey and render it as an interactive map: the base map, the drawn route line(s), and step-by-step guidance (legs, transfers, next action). Same inputs as plan_journey — `from`/`to` are a station id (`feedId:stopId`) or `geo:<lat>,<lon>` — plus an optional `strategy` (balanced/fastest/fewestTransfers/lowestFare/shortestWalk). Prefer this over plan_journey when a visual route or map helps the user; on hosts without UI support it returns the same route as text.

from.description: Origin: a station id (feedId:stopId) or geo:<lat>,<lon>.

to.description: Destination: a station id (feedId:stopId) or geo:<lat>,<lon>.

fromLabel.description: Optional display name for the origin.

toLabel.description: Optional display name for the destination.

viaLabel.description: Optional display label for each via, positionally matched to via[].

date.description: Service date YYYYMMDD; defaults to today in the result timezone.

time.description: HH:MM or HH:MM:SS; defaults to the current time.

type.description: 出発 / 到着 / 始発 / 終電.

allowModes.description: Comma-separated transit modes to allow (pre-scan filter), e.g. rail,bus.

avoidModes.description: Comma-separated transit modes to avoid (pre-scan filter), e.g. bus,air,ferry.

avoidWalk.description: When true, exclude any itinerary containing a walking segment.

via.description: Up to 3 経由 waypoints, repeated: a station id or geo:<lat>,<lon>. Departure/arrival searches only.

tools.name: suggest_places
tools.description: Autocomplete places — stations, stops, facilities, and addresses — for a free-text query `q`. Use this to resolve a place name into an id or `geo:` point before plan_journey.

tools.name: suggest_stations
tools.description: Autocomplete stations only (parent-station, multilingual prefix) for a query `q`. Cleaner than suggest_places when the user clearly named a station.

tools.name: reverse_geocode
tools.description: List places/stations near a `lat`/`lon` point (optionally within `radiusMeters`). Turns a map point into nearby boarding options.

tools.name: get_station
tools.description: Station detail — platforms and serving routes — for a feed-qualified station id (`feedId:stopId`).

tools.name: station_departures
tools.description: Upcoming departure board for a station id, where the feed's license permits this presentation. Optional `date` (YYYYMMDD), `time` (HH:MM), and `limit`.

tools.name: list_feeds
tools.description: List ingested transit feeds with license, attribution, and freshness — for coverage/sourcing answers and data provenance.
